note: Intended design (flow/shared-core/sequence) + the as-built class diagram added at ② implement. The plan-time flow diagram accurately depicts the shipped Slice-1 loop (the code was written to it); class = the concrete shipped Go structure (orchestrator package + launch/contract additions).
